summary: Post code-quality-fix verification (useCallback hooks + refactored Careers + stable keys). Backend contact API 200 OK; careers API returns 500 as expected (Resend test-mode restriction to career@ email). Frontend loads with ZERO console/page errors. Hero video renders, mouse parallax executes without errors after useCallback fix, department switcher toggles VFX/Digital cleanly, Watch Our Reel modal opens with video, contact form fields fill correctly, Careers page renders all refactored components (CareerValues, AboutSection, ApplicationForm) with 7 headings and working form fields, BackToTop appears after scroll (300px threshold). Visual design preserved as required.
passed: Hero <video> element rendered (Watch Reel modal confirms local MP4 loads)
Mouse parallax movements (useCallback handleMouseMove) - no errors
Department switcher toggles VFX <-> Digital correctly (screenshots confirm content change)
Scroll animations execute without errors (useCallback handleScroll)
BackToTop button appears after scrolling past 300px
Watch Our Reel modal opens with playable video, Escape closes it
/careers route loads, refactored components render (7 headings), Application form inputs work
Zero console errors / page errors across full flow

failed.issue: POST /api/careers returns 500 due to Resend test-mode restriction blocking delivery to career@ripplevfxstudios.com
failed.evidence: curl -X POST /api/careers -> HTTP 500 {detail: Failed to submit application...}

action_items: Careers 500 is EXPECTED per problem statement (Resend test-mode). For production, verify domain in Resend or update CAREERS_EMAIL. No code change needed for current MVP.
Optional: catch Resend delivery failure separately from DB insert so applications still persist even when email delivery fails.
notes: Code quality refactor (useCallback hooks, stable keys, Careers component split) did NOT break any functionality. Visual design preserved. Zero regressions detected.
